item.title: Lamborghini Maintenance Check
item.description: A detailed maintenance inspection on a Lamborghini. Diagnostics, mechanical checks, and performance review show the process of keeping a high-end supercar in top condition.

media:content.media:title: Lamborghini Maintenance Check
media:content.media:description: A detailed maintenance inspection on a Lamborghini. Diagnostics, mechanical checks, and performance review show the process of keeping a high-end supercar in top condition.

item.title: It Was All So Simple Car Repair Story
item.description: A reflection on a repair job that seemed simple at first but revealed deeper challenges. Real workshop insights and problem-solving during vehicle diagnostics.

media:content.media:description: A reflection on a repair job that seemed simple at first but revealed deeper challenges. Real workshop insights and problem-solving during vehicle diagnostics.

item.title: XLR Repair for 30 Cents
item.description: A surprising repair on an XLR completed for just 30 cents in parts. Quick diagnostics and clever fixes show resourceful automotive troubleshooting in action.

media:content.media:title: XLR Repair for 30 Cents
media:content.media:description: A surprising repair on an XLR completed for just 30 cents in parts. Quick diagnostics and clever fixes show resourceful automotive troubleshooting in action.

item.title: AC Repair Tips and Common Issues
item.description: A breakdown of common car AC problems and how they’re diagnosed and repaired. Practical workshop insights into cooling system troubleshooting and fixes.

media:content.media:description: A breakdown of common car AC problems and how they’re diagnosed and repaired. Practical workshop insights into cooling system troubleshooting and fixes.

item.title: Bentley Inspection and Diagnosis
item.description: A detailed look at a Bentley’s condition in the workshop. Inspection, diagnostics, and repair considerations for a high-end luxury vehicle system.

item.title: Ticking Toyota Engine Diagnosis
item.description: A Toyota engine with a ticking noise is diagnosed in the shop. Step-by-step troubleshooting identifies the cause and explores possible repair solutions.

media:content.media:description: A Toyota engine with a ticking noise is diagnosed in the shop. Step-by-step troubleshooting identifies the cause and explores possible repair solutions.

item.title: JDM Land Cruiser Repair and Inspection
item.description: A detailed repair and inspection of a JDM Land Cruiser. Step-by-step troubleshooting, maintenance work, and restoration insights on a classic off-road vehicle.

media:content.media:description: A detailed repair and inspection of a JDM Land Cruiser. Step-by-step troubleshooting, maintenance work, and restoration insights on a classic off-road vehicle.

item.title: Can a Car Run Without a Turbo?
item.description: A simple breakdown of whether a turbocharged car can run without its turbo system. Explaining performance impact, drivability changes, and basic engine function differences.

media:content.media:description: A simple breakdown of whether a turbocharged car can run without its turbo system. Explaining performance impact, drivability changes, and basic engine function differences.

item.title: Finding Two Issues on a BMW 535i
item.description: A diagnostic inspection of a BMW 535i revealing two key issues. Step-by-step troubleshooting, system checks, and repair insights on a modern luxury vehicle.

item.title: Ford 5.4 V8 Engine Tear-Down
item.description: A detailed tear-down of a Ford 5.4 V8 engine. Step-by-step disassembly, inspection of internal components, and insights into wear and mechanical condition.

item.title: Why Some Cars Don’t Last Long
item.description: A breakdown of common reasons vehicles wear out early. Covering maintenance habits, mechanical stress, and key factors that affect long-term car reliability.

item.title: Fixing a 2019 Dodge Charger Pursuit
item.description: A repair and diagnostic process on a 2019 Dodge Charger Pursuit. Step-by-step troubleshooting, system checks, and fixes to restore proper vehicle performance.

media:content.media:title: Fixing a 2019 Dodge Charger Pursuit
media:content.media:description: A repair and diagnostic process on a 2019 Dodge Charger Pursuit. Step-by-step troubleshooting, system checks, and fixes to restore proper vehicle performance.
